descriptionHtml:
Lagoon 42 for sale 2016

If you are in the market for a well-maintained and spacious catamaran, the Lagoon 42  2016 is an attractive option. This vessel, designed for comfort and performance, offers all the features needed for enjoyable cruising. With its current location in Sicily, it represents a reliable investment for sailors looking for quality.

Key Specifications

  • Builder: Lagoon
  • Model: Lagoon 42
  • Flag: Italian
  • Year Built: 2016
  • Overall Length: 12.80 m
  • Beam: 7.70 m
  • Draft: 1.25 m
  • Number of Owners: 1
  • Registration: Registered vessel
  • Safety Certificate Expiry: 2024
  • Capacity: 12 persons
  • Location: Sicily

Deck and Hull

The Lagoon 42 features a robust fiberglass hull, ensuring both durability and aesthetic appeal. The deck is equipped with:

  • Cushions: Comfortable seating for relaxation
  • Cockpit Table: Ideal for dining and socializing

Interior

TheLagoon 42 for sale 2016 boasts a functional and inviting interior layout:

  • Cabins: 4 double cabins
  • Crew Cabins: 2
  • Dinette Beds: 1
  • Bathrooms: 4 plus 1 for crew
  • Showers: 2 (1 in the crew area)
  • Galley Appliances:
    • Stove: Yes
    • Oven: Yes
    • Refrigerator: Yes

This configuration allows for adequate space and comfort for both guests and crew.

Engine and Propulsion

The catamaran is powered by two reliable Yanmar inboard engines:

  • Number of Engines: 2
  • Engine Type: Inboard
  • Power: 57 hp each
  • Engine Year: 2016
  • Engine Hours: 3,500
  • Fuel Tank Capacity: 500 liters

This reliable setup ensures you have the power to navigate a variety of conditions comfortably.

Navigation and Safety Equipment

This Lagoon 42 for sale 2016 is equipped with essential navigation and safety equipment to enhance your sailing experience:

  • Autopilot: Yes
  • VHF Radio: Yes
  • Echosounder: Yes
  • Compass: Yes
  • Stereo System: Yes
  • Plotter: Yes
  • Wind Instrument: Yes

These features enhance safety and ease of navigation, making your sailing experience more enjoyable.

Water and Electrical Systems

  • Battery Count: 6
  • Charger: Yes
  • Boiler: Yes
  • Freshwater Pump: Yes
  • Black Water System: Yes
  • Outdoor Shower: Yes

These systems ensure that you have all the necessary amenities for comfortable living on board.

Additional Features

  • Lazy Bag: Yes
  • Furling Jib: Yes
  • Tender: Yes
  • Outboard Motor: Yes
  • Anchor Windlass: Yes
  • Anchor Chain: Yes
  • Mooring Lines: Yes
  • Liferaft: Yes
  • Fenders: 8

This well-equipped catamaran is designed for functionality and makes for  a great platform for exploration and relaxation.

The Lagoon 42 for sale 2016, in good condition, presents a solid opportunity for those seeking a reliable sailing vessel. If you're interested in viewing or learning more about this catamaran, please feel free to reach out.
